identity.name: LocalMart
identity.description: A minimalist, hyperlocal e-commerce platform connecting local sellers with neighbors.

layout_system.spacing_scale: Recommended: p-4, p-6, p-8, p-12, p-16 (Generous spacing)

grids.product_grid: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-x-6 gap-y-10

Button.base: inline-flex items-center justify-center font-medium transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-400 focus:ring-offset-2 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none ring-offset-white

variants.default: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 py-2 px-4
variants.outline: border border-input hover:bg-slate-50 hover:text-slate-900 h-10 py-2 px-4

Card.base: rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white text-slate-950 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:shadow-md

Input.base: flex h-12 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-200 bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-400 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-primary disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

Badge.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

hero_banner.alt: Fresh grocery delivery in paper bag

accessibility.focus_states: Visible 2px ring offset-2 on all interactive elements

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement 'framer-motion' for smooth page transitions and micro-interactions.
Prioritize mobile responsiveness. The layout must stack perfectly on mobile.
For the 'Seller Dashboard', use a dense table layout for inventory management.
For the 'Customer Shop', use large product cards with clear 'Add to Cart' buttons.
Authentication pages should be clean, centered cards with social login placeholders if needed (but prioritize Email/Password).
Do NOT use gradients for backgrounds. Stick to solid white or very light slate (#F8FAFC).
Use the provided image URLs for the landing page and dummy product data.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Don't make generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12px blur) for sticky headers.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 in the UI.
